Menus | Yolan | Nashville, TN
This season’s regional dishes inspired by Friuli-Venezia Giulia
DINNER
Nightly, 5 pm to 10 pm
À La Carte Menu
Esperienza Yolan Tasting Menu
Dolci ~ Dessert Menu
Wine, Cocktails and Spirits List
Yolan’s dinner menu is a celebration of Italian culinary tradition, craftsmanship, and seasonality.
This winter, the menu draws inspiration from
Piemonte
— a region in northern Italy where alpine valleys, noble wines, and time-honored culinary traditions shape a cuisine of depth and refinement. Each dish marked with a wild boar emblem pays tribute to Piemonte’s forested hills and enduring food culture — where braises are slow, pastas are hand-pinched, and every element is shaped by place and season.
Begin with house-made focaccia and antipasti such as
Smoked Rainbow Trout
with egg yolk jam and brioche, or Capesante Gratinate — seared scallops with sunchoke and citrus. Pastas include
Agnolotti del Plin
with lamb and cabbage,
Tajarin
with house-made salsiccia ragù, and
Gnocchi alla Bava
with Fontina Val d’Aosta and truffles. Wood-fired steaks, winter seafood, and composed vegetable dishes anchor the Secondi, Bistecche, and Contorni, crafted with ingredients from Italian artisans and local farms.
Esperienza Yolan
, our five-course prix fixe tasting menu, offers a guided journey through signature dishes and seasonal expressions. Dolci are intricate finales — from the Hazelnut–Chocolate Torte with croccante and warm chocolate sauce to
Polenta Olive Oil Cake
with orange sorbet and Gelato al Latte, a nod to Piemonte’s dairy heritage.
An extensive wine list is joined by crafted cocktails, Italian spirits, and amari — available by the pour or in curated flights — to round out an evening immersed in warm hospitality and Italian sensibility.
Comforting dishes and lighter fare highlight lunch at Yolan
weekday lunch
Monday to Thursday, 11 am to 3 pm
Yolan’s new lunch invites a return to the Italian table — unhurried, expressive, and thoughtfully seasonal. The menu balances warmth and elegance, offering comforting pastas like
Truffle Gnocchi
and
Risotto alla Milanese
, alongside lighter fare such as the
Winter Harvest Panzanella
or our house
Grilled Caesar
with kohlrabi and chicories.
Handhelds include the
Chicken Milanese Sandwic
h with Saint Angel brie and the signature
Yolan Burger
with Bear Creek Farms beef, while house-made pastries and refined dolci — such as the
Lemon-Ricotta Cast Iron Cookie
or
Bomboloni
with red wine berries — bring a sweet finish to the midday hour.
Curated wines, Italian-inspired cocktails, and espresso round out a menu designed for those living, staying, and working downtown, seeking an elevated yet effortless midday pause.
Weekday Lunch Menu
Yolan’s signature Stuzzi Tower inspired by Friuli-Venezia Giulia
AFTERNOON APERITIVO
Daily, 3 pm to 5 pm
Inspired by the timeless Italian ritual of gathering before dinner, Aperitivo at Yolan invites guests to unwind and celebrate
La Dolce Vita
.
This February,
Aperitivo Alpino
channels the alpine spirit of Northern Italy in honor of the 2026 Winter Games. The menu features rustic, high-elevation flavors from the host regions of Veneto and Lombardia, including crispy fritti, polenta, and mountain cheeses paired with seasonal cocktails and a curated flight of Northern Italian wines.
Aperitivo Alpino Menu
La Tavola in La Cucina
LA TAVOLA IN LA CUCINA
À la carte or tasting menu available nightly.
Experience the heart of Yolan — the scents, the sights, and the energy — seated at the most exclusive table in Nashville: La Tavola in La Cucina. La Tavola invites up to four guests to dine within our kitchen, witnessing our culinary team’s finesse and craft, as the chefs preside over your experience to bring to life our love letter to Italy.
Reserve La Tavola
Weekend Brunch at Yolan
Breakfast and WEEKEND bruncH
Monday to Thursday, 7 am to 11 am
Friday to Sunday, 7 am to 3 pm
Inspired by The Joseph's family heritage, an Italian espresso bar with house-made pastries creates a buzz of activity each morning at Yolan, as the bright and airy dining room welcomes guests and locals to fuel their day with classic morning favorites and signature weekend brunch dishes.
Weekday Breakfast Menu
Weekend Brunch Menu
Seasonal Pastries at Yolan’s Espresso Bar
espresso bar and pasticceria
Daily, 6 am to 3 pm
Yolan's talented pastry team crafts an array of pastry offerings each morning available warmed for dine-in or packaged to-go at the Espresso Bar. Try a house-laminated croissant — flaky butter or rich chocolate. Indulge in a giant cinnamon roll or espresso danish. Discover the gluten-free muffin flavor of the day. Fill up on something savory or seasonally inspired. Whatever your choice, satisfying mornings begin here.
Espresso Bar Menu
